features: ORGANISE: Add medication or vitamin tablets to each clearly labelled daily compartment. Storing medication daily helps to reduce anxiety and confusion, providing a quick easy to see compartment at any time of the day.
PERFECT FOR TRAVEL: Easily store each day's medication or vitamin requirements in one handy lightweight pack, convenient for travel

DAILY COMPARTMENTS: Easy to read daily compartments to safely store each day's requirements. Storing medication daily helps to reduce anxiety and confusion, providing a quick easy to see compartment at any timeof the day.
SAFE: Durable, airtight compartments ensure medication is securely protected from dust and humidity.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Plastic 7 Day Unit
description: Product Description MASTERPLAST 7 Day MEDICATION & VITAMIN STORAGE ORGANISER Directions [HYPOTHETICAL] 1. Open the container, 2. Place daily medication or vitamin tablets in each compartment, 3. Close the container, 4. Carry the container for travel or store in a convenient location at home.
